text:
Done! I've created **two documentation files** for you and your teammates:

## Files Created

| File | Size | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
| `ECOTRACK_CODE_EXPLANATION.txt` | 43 KB | Plain text format - easy to share via email/WhatsApp |
| `ECOTRACK_DOCUMENTATION.md` | 16 KB | Markdown format - better for GitHub/GitLab viewing |

**Location**: `/home/bot4u/Desktop/GEMINI/Mini_project_test_copy/`

## What's Included

Both files contain:
- ✅ Complete explanation of all 9 API endpoints
- ✅ Database schema (2 tables with all columns)
- ✅ Core savings calculation logic (the most important algorithm)
- ✅ Period filtering explanation
- ✅ Room mapping logic
- ✅ 10 examination Q&A with answers
- ✅ Code flow diagrams
- ✅ File structure overview
- ✅ How to run the application

## Share with Teammates

**For WhatsApp/Email**: Share `ECOTRACK_CODE_EXPLANATION.txt`

**For GitHub/GitLab**: Upload `ECOTRACK_DOCUMENTATION.md`

Good luck with your external examination! 🎓
